data.queryValue:
/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   ПАРАМЕТРЫ QL-ВИДЖЕТА (оставляем без изменений)
   {{interval_from}} : date-interval (начало)
   {{interval_to}}   : date-interval (конец)
   {{month_ago}}     : number   (≥1; сколько месяцев назад брать)
   {{geo_list}}      : string   multi (например: ОАЭ, Бали)
   {{utm_list}}      : string   multi (например: google, yandex)
------------------------------------------------------------------ */

WITH
  /* 1. Параметры по дате */
  date_p AS (
    SELECT
      extract(day FROM {{interval_from}}::date)      AS d_from,
      extract(day FROM {{interval_to}}  ::date)      AS d_to,
      date_trunc('month', {{interval_to}}::date)     AS cur_month,
      make_interval(months => {{month_ago}}::int - 1) AS ago_int
  ),

  /* 2. Разбор multi-select в массив text[] */
  list_p AS (
      SELECT
        NULLIF(
          ARRAY(
            SELECT m[1]
            FROM regexp_matches(
                   coalesce($$ {{geo_list}} $$, ''),
                   E'E''([^'']+)''',
                   'g'
                 ) AS m
          ),
          ARRAY[]::text[]
        ) AS geo_arr,
        NULLIF(
          ARRAY(
            SELECT m[1]
            FROM regexp_matches(
                   coalesce($$ {{utm_list}} $$, ''),
                   E'E''([^'']+)''',
                   'g'
                 ) AS m
          ),
          ARRAY[]::text[]
        ) AS utm_arr
    ),

  /* 3. Сумма квалов A/B/C по каждому дню (учитываем GEO/UTM для фильтрации) */
  daily AS (
    SELECT
      ps.creation_date::date                     AS day_date,
      ps.geo                                      AS geo,
      ps.utmsource                                AS utmsource,
      sum(COALESCE(ps.quals_a,0))::int            AS daily_a,
      sum(COALESCE(ps.quals_b,0))::int            AS daily_b,
      sum(COALESCE(ps.quals_c,0))::int            AS daily_c,
      date_trunc('month', ps.creation_date)::date AS month_start
    FROM mart.perfomance_svodny_actions AS ps
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
  ),

  /* 4. Фильтрация по дате, дням месяца и спискам */
  filtered AS (
    SELECT
      d.day_date,
      d.daily_a,
      d.daily_b,
      d.daily_c,
      d.month_start
    FROM daily AS d
    CROSS JOIN date_p  AS dp
    CROSS JOIN list_p  AS lp
    WHERE
      extract(day FROM d.day_date) BETWEEN dp.d_from AND dp.d_to
      AND d.day_date >= dp.cur_month - dp.ago_int
      AND d.day_date <= {{interval_to}}::date
      AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL      OR d.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
      AND (lp.utm_arr IS NULL      OR d.utmsource = ANY(lp.utm_arr))
  ),

  /* 5. Ежемесячная агрегация и расчёт средних/медиан для A/B/C */
  monthly_agg AS (
    SELECT
      month_start                                   AS month_start,
      to_char(month_start, 'MM.YYYY')               AS "Месяц периода",

      -- Квалы A
      sum(daily_a)::int                             AS "Квалы A",
      avg(daily_a)::numeric(10,2)                   AS "AVG_A_дневных",
      percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY daily_a)  AS "MED_A_дневных",

      -- Квалы B
      sum(daily_b)::int                             AS "Квалы B",
      avg(daily_b)::numeric(10,2)                   AS "AVG_B_дневных",
      percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY daily_b)  AS "MED_B_дневных",

      -- Квалы C
      sum(daily_c)::int                             AS "Квалы C",
      avg(daily_c)::numeric(10,2)                   AS "AVG_C_дневных",
      percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY daily_c)  AS "MED_C_дневных"
    FROM filtered
    GROUP BY month_start
  ),

  /* 6. Медиана по всем месяцам для каждой категории */
  overall_median AS (
    SELECT
      percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Квалы A")::int AS "Медиана A",
      percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Квалы B")::int AS "Медиана B",
      percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Квалы C")::int AS "Медиана C"
    FROM monthly_agg
  )

/* 7. Окончательный вывод: строки по месяцам + константные медианы категорий */
SELECT
  ma.month_start,
  ma."Месяц периода",

  -- Квалы A
  ma."Квалы A",
  ma."AVG_A_дневных",
  ma."MED_A_дневных",

  -- Квалы B
  ma."Квалы B",
  ma."AVG_B_дневных",
  ma."MED_B_дневных",

  -- Квалы C
  ma."Квалы C",
  ma."AVG_C_дневных",
  ma."MED_C_дневных",

  -- Общие медианы по месяцам
  om."Медиана A",
  om."Медиана B",
  om."Медиана C"
FROM monthly_agg AS ma
CROSS JOIN overall_median AS om
ORDER BY ma.month_start ASC;
